_comment: MCP server entry for browser automation via @playwright/mcp (Microsoft).
Merge the 'browser' key below into the mcpServers object of the project-root .mcp.json.
Requires Node.js 18+. No additional install needed — npx pulls the package on first run.
Remove the _comment key before using this file.
Available tool groups exposed by this server:
Scripting    : browser_evaluate (run arbitrary JS in page context)
--isolated                           fresh browser context per session (good for tests)

browser._when_to_use: Gives Claude the ability to control a real browser: navigate pages, take screenshots, click elements, fill forms, switch tabs, emit keyboard/mouse events, and evaluate JavaScript. Used by test-writer for E2E test execution, developer-frontend for visual verification, and any workflow requiring browser interaction or screenshot capture.
